title: Jaljeera
description: A refreshing North Indian cumin and mint cooler with a tangy, spicy kick. Perfect before meals or on hot summer days.
steps: Blend the mint, cilantro, ginger, green chili, lemon juice, cumin powder, black salt, salt, and chaat masala with a little water until smooth.
Mix with the remaining cold water.
Serve over ice and garnish with mint leaves.
notes: A pinch of boondi makes it even more authentic.
